9//
10// This file implements the Unix specific (non-pthread) Mutex class.
11//
12//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
13
14//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
15//=== WARNING: Implementation here must contain only generic UNIX code that
16//=== is guaranteed to work on *all* UNIX variants.
17//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
